text.title: pytest Project Setup — Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed when python-pytest-setup is mis-applied, each with symptom, root cause, and concrete fix.

antipattern.reason: Root cause: @pytest.mark.intgration (typo) silently runs as untagged. Fix: Add --strict-markers and declare every marker.
Root cause: Tests shipped in the wheel; import confusion. Fix: Move to tests/ mirroring src/.
Root cause: Coverage drifts down; no gate. Fix: Set --cov-fail-under=80 or project floor.

antipattern.description: pytest-xdist with a fixture that writes to a shared file.
antipattern.reason: Root cause: Race conditions between workers; intermittent failures. Fix: Use unique temp paths per worker (tmp_path fixture).
Root cause: Cannot use fixtures, parametrize loses its features. Fix: Use pytest-style for new tests; legacy TestCase OK for grandfathered code.
